fix_diff: cr_narrow_ci: expand copytree ignore patterns for .devfleet/.trae/coverage/dist/data/vector_data/*.sqlite, cleanup TemporaryDirectory on overlay exceptions, return failed_step=overlay_prepare with structured steps when overlay prep fails. self_maintenance_loop_runner: review/QA prompts now include target branch, base branch, repo URL, fetch instruction, and warning not to inspect the report-only task branch; Para input also carries review_target_branch/base/repo.
root_cause: cr_narrow_ci 复制了过宽的目录树，并允许覆盖准备异常在没有结构化验证步骤的情况下逃逸。仅报告的审查/QA 提示未固定 repo/base/target branch 的拉取语义，导致 QA 可能比较仅报告工作区分支而非 employee 代码分支。
symptom: 自维护审查/QA 阻塞了窄范围 CI 覆盖分支：覆盖准备缺少结构化失败清理，复制了运行时 DB/状态，且仅报告 QA 检查了自己的空分支而非目标分支。
